task_completion.description: Open the Project Configuration or Link Types settings dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for 'Project Configuration', 'Project Settings', or 'Link Types' is open in the ReqView application.

task_completion.description: Configure the new link type with the correct Name and ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the link types configuration, a new entry is visible with the Name 'Mitigates' and the ID 'mitigates'.

task_completion.description: Set the Source and Target documents for the new link type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mitigates' link type shows 'RISKS' as the allowed Source document and 'SRS' as the allowed Target document.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the RISKS document and locate the first risk object
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view displays the RISKS document, and the first risk object (RISK-1) is visible or selected.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Mitigates' link from RISK-1 to SRS-1
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Links column for the RISK-1 row, there is a visual indicator (such as an outgoing arrow or badge) showing a link to 'SRS-1' using the 'Mitigates' type.

task_completion.description: Save the project after making changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar or document tab does not show an asterisk (*) next to the project name, or a 'Project Saved' notification is visible, indicating there are no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to configure the link type and create the link.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with ReqView menus, dialogs, and document views rather than a text editor modifying JSON files.

integrity.description: The link was created using the application's linking functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The link appears in the dedicated Links column or traceability matrix, not just typed as plain text into a description or custom text attribute field.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not shown executing scripts (like sed, awk, or python) to directly modify the project files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/define_link_type_project'. The expected new link ID is 'mitigates' and its name is 'Mitigates'. The source document for the link is 'RISKS' (documents/RISKS.json) and the target document is 'SRS' (documents/SRS.json).
